qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Pickle-inside-pickle bypass of fickling static analysis via missing pickle module in unsafe_imports denylist
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes missing ctypes, importlib, runpy, code, and multiprocessing modules from the unsafe_imports denylist. This finding describes the pickle module being missing from the same denylist. While both are incomplete denylist issues in the same code location (fickle.py:866-884), they are different missing modules with different bypass techniques. The advisory-specific missing modules (ctypes, importlib, etc.) are not addressed by this finding.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The qualifying finding does not match the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory specifically describes missing ctypes, importlib, runpy, code, and multiprocessing modules from the unsafe_imports denylist in Fickling (CVE-2026-22609). The pickle_nested_deserialization_bypass finding identifies a different missing module (pickle) from the same denylist. The finding does not demonstrate the bypass technique or missing modules specified in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory CVE-2026-22609 specifies missing modules: ctypes, importlib, runpy, code, multiprocessing
pickle_nested_deserialization_bypass finding identifies missing pickle module (not in advisory list)
Finding does not demonstrate ctypes, importlib, runpy, code, or multiprocessing bypass
